overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a crowded neon-lit nightclub. The player moves from the main dance floor with blue neon strips, past the bar area with red lighting, up a red-lit staircase, and into a back restroom area. The environment features industrial metal scaffolding, holographic advertisements, and dense crowds of dancing NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded nightclub dance floor with blue neon floor strips

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the crowded dance floor toward the bar area

entered.detail: large red-lit metal truss structure along the left wall
glowing blue neon light strip running along the floor edge
illuminated bar counter with blue neon trim visible in the distance
suspended metal cage light fixtures hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a bustling nightclub dance floor bathed in blue neon light. Industrial scaffolding structures line the left side while crowds of dancing NPCs fill the central area. The camera moves forward through the scattered crowd toward a distant bar counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub bar area with red neon lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from blue to red dominant as camera approaches the bar

agents.ego_description: navigating past the bar counter and through dancers toward the back stairs

notable_agents.action: dancer in patterned jacket raising arms and moving energetically

entered.detail: staircase illuminated with red neon lights at the rear of the club
blue-lit bar counter with glowing edge trim now passing by on the left

segments.scene_description: Moving past the blue-lit bar counter, the environment transitions to red-dominated lighting. The camera continues through the dense dancing crowd toward a red-lit staircase at the rear. A dancer in a distinctive jacket moves prominently in the foreground.

events.description: enters enclosed stairwell with intense red neon step lighting
transitions from red stairwell to dim corridor with yellow accent lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the red-lit stairs and proceeding through the back corridor

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera in the narrow stairwell

entered.detail: illuminated poster advertising 'Valentinos' on the corridor wall
vertical yellow neon light strip in the distant corridor
doorway leading to restroom area at corridor end

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a narrow stairwell bathed in intense red neon light, passing an NPC descending in the opposite direction. At the top, the scene transitions to a dimly lit back corridor with a yellow accent light and a prominent Valentinos poster on the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub restroom with stalls and sinks

events.description: enters the restroom area from the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: entering the restroom and approaching the sink area

notable_agents.action: standing at the sink counter facing the mirror

entered.detail: metal restroom stall doors with graffiti and stickers
bathroom sink counter with mirror and various items
stainless steel toilet visible inside open stall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit restroom with metal stalls and a sink counter. An NPC stands at the sink facing the mirror. The environment features stickers and posters on the walls, with a stainless steel toilet visible in an open stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, blue-lit dance floor into the dim, industrial seclusion of a nightclub restroom. It begins by pushing through a bustling crowd beneath blue neon strips and industrial scaffolding, moving steadily toward a distant bar. As the camera passes the bar, the atmosphere shifts into deep red lighting, gliding past dancing NPCs and a prominent figure in a distinctive jacket toward a rear staircase. The scene then ascends a narrow, red-lit stairwell, passing a descending patron before emerging into a dimly lit corridor marked by a yellow accent light and a Valentinos poster. Finally, the camera enters a gritty restroom area, moving past metal stalls and wall stickers toward a sink where an NPC stands facing the mirror.
